source: bolt-hole-working-brief.md + George & Mary weight update 13 Mar 2026

geography.description: Must be in one of the target corridors
geography.postcodes_south_coast_note: 2535 = Berry/Jaspers Brush/Bellawongarah (Shoalhaven). 2577 = Kangaroo Valley (Shoalhaven). Added per George feedback 11 Mar 2026.

dwelling.note: George: 'the house has to move into the must have column'. Not a palace — modest but liveable.

zoning.note: RU1/RU2/RU4 are primary. RU6 (transition), C3 (environmental management), C4 (environmental living), R5 (large lot residential) may qualify but need case-by-case review.

drive_time.note: 4 hours is the hard limit. George said Jugiong was 'on the limit'.

scoring._note: Weights updated 13 Mar 2026 per George & Mary feedback. Drive time doubled (10→20), carbon and convenience dropped to 0. Total = 100.

water.description: Permanent water — creek/river frontage, bore, dams

seclusion.description: Remote / secluded feel, end of road, no close neighbours

drive_time_bonus.description: Bonus for shorter drive — under 3.5 hours ideal

national_park_adjacent.description: Adjacent to or near National Park or State Forest

carbon_eligible.description: Dropped per George 13 Mar 2026 — not a factor

convenience.description: Dropped per George 13 Mar 2026 — not a factor

tags._note: Observable features flagged on each property. Not scored — just visible. George's reactions to tagged properties inform future scoring adjustments.

feedback._note: George's reactions to surfaced properties. Each entry captures what he liked, disliked, or flagged. Over time this builds a preference profile that sharpens the search.

entries.comment: Closest visual match to brief. River front, hilly, out of the way, house but not a palace. All spot on. Issue was drive time at limit.
Rated brief 9/10. Requested adding Berry/Kangaroo Valley area. Wants rural agents (Elders etc) who may not list on Domain. 'Looks fantastic, really impressed.'

bushfire.description: Assess BFPL category. Prefer mitigatable, not extreme.
bushfire.action: Overlay BFPL data on shortlisted properties

flood.action: Check flood mapping for shortlisted properties

reference_property.description: Jugiong property — closest visual match to brief
reference_property.issue: 4 hours from Sydney — at the drive time limit
reference_property.note: George said 'probably both' — 4hrs is the ceiling AND the property itself needed to justify the drive. But the property was 'all spot on'.
